markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on performance, content strategy, and new tour promotion.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Vallarta GA sales dropped in Nov/Dec,** prompting a full-year report to confirm the trend and rule out seasonality. GSC data shows organic traffic was flat, creating a discrepancy that needs investigation.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [**Scrunch data is inaccurate due to a single account;** Jo will explore creating three separate accounts (one per location) to enable precise competitive analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [**New content priorities set:** Valentine's Day articles, an update for the annual "Events" articles, and a new article for Vallarta's expanded Las Caletas Kids Adventure Park.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [**Cabo's new triple-deck catamaran launches next month,** requiring significant promotional support to meet its \~70% capacity target and ensure profitability on a major investment.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=1972.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Analytics

  - [**Vallarta GA Sales Drop:**](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
      - [A significant sales drop was observed for Vallarta in Nov/Dec.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
      - [**Methodology:** To enable YoY comparison, the team aggregates "organic," "direct," and "not set" channels, as Google recently re-categorized "not set" traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
      - [A full-year report is being created to confirm the trend and rule out seasonality.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [**GSC vs. GA Discrepancy:**](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
      - [GSC data for Vallarta shows organic traffic was flat in Nov, with a seasonal spike in the third week of Dec.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
      - This conflicts with the GA sales drop, indicating a potential tracking issue. The discrepancy should be \<15%; a larger gap suggests a GA setup problem.
  - [**New Looker Dashboards:**](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
      - [GrowthX is rolling out new Looker templates for all locations.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
      - [**Key features:**](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
          - [YoY comparison (essential for seasonal businesses).](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
          - [Engaged sessions vs. total sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
          - [LLM referral traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
          - [Cohort analysis by content cluster (e.g., "tours in Cabo").](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)
  - [**December Organic Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
      - [All locations saw a strong third week of Dec.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
      - [**Vallarta:** Impressions \>100k → \~300k; clicks \~500 → \~250k.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
      - [**Cancun:** Impressions \~300k; clicks \~1k → \~2k.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
      - **Cabo:** Impressions \~200k; clicks \<1k → \~1.5k.
      - [**Insight:** Top-funnel content (e.g., "Shopping in Cabo") drives traffic, but tour-specific content (e.g., "Whale Watching") drives more relevant, high-intent visitors.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)

### LLM Visibility (Scrunch)

  - [**Problem:** The single Scrunch account for "The Adventures Group" aggregates data, making it impossible to perform accurate competitive analysis for individual locations.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [**Solution:** Jo will explore creating three separate Scrunch accounts, one for each location's website.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [**Future:** GrowthX may switch from Scrunch to its own upcoming AI visibility tool, "Check That."](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=2216.0)

### Content Strategy & New Tours

  - [**Valentine's Day Campaign:**](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create "5 Ideas to Celebrate San Valentín" articles for each location to support an email campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
      - [**Action:** Adventures Group to provide 5 tour ideas per location.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [**Las Caletas Kids Adventure Park (Vallarta):**](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
      - [**Update:** New activities added: a giant climbing net, a petting zoo, and a VR simulator.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Action:** Create a new article specifically for the park (for ages 4–9), as it's outside the "toddler" category.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
  - [**Annual "Events" Articles:**](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)
      - [**Action:** Update the annual "Events in \[Destination\]" articles for each location.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)
      - [**Rationale:** These are highly valuable for internal linking and partnerships (e.g., with the Vallarta Tourist Bureau).](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)
  - [**New Cabo Catamaran:**](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=1937.0)
      - [**Launch:** Next month.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
      - [**Vessel:** New, triple-deck catamaran with \~150-person capacity.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=1972.0)
      - [**Experiences:**](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=1986.0)
          - [**Morning:** Leisurely cruise with snorkeling, a DJ, and a special chef.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=1986.0)
          - [**Sunset:** Party cruise with a DJ.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=2029.0)
      - [**Action:** Begin content production now to build SEO authority before launch.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=2193.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is a major investment requiring high capacity utilization (\~70%) for profitability.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Adventures Group:**](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
      - [Share the full-year GA sales report for Vallarta by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
      - [Email 5 tour ideas per location for the Valentine's Day articles.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
      - [Send a complete list of tours (names, locations, upcoming releases) to Jo.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
      - [Investigate the Vallarta GA vs. GSC data discrepancy.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
      - [Explore creating three separate Scrunch accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
      - [Schedule updates for the annual "Events" articles.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)
      - [Queue a new article for the Las Caletas Kids Adventure Park.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
      - [Begin content planning for the new Cabo catamaran.](https://fathom.video/share/AMa3aQUXD5VXTWN8DKAXdj7RHKZxpL1W?tab=summary&timestamp=2193.0)
